heading: View a Profile
body:
To return the details of the Atlas CLI profile you specify using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas config describe <name> [options]

```

To list all Atlas CLI profiles using the Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas config list [options]

```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for the previous commands, see the Atlas CLI documentation for
[atlas config describe](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-config-describe) and [atlas config list](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-config-list).
